why.title:
One intentional
<1>date every Wednesday
why.desc: Tired of endless swiping and dead-end 'Hi's? We send you one quality match every Wednesday. No games, just real university students.
why.noSwipingDesc: Our algorithm handles everything for you.
why.campusSafeDesc: Exclusive to students with verified .edu.hk emails.
why.personalizedDesc: We match based on values, vibe, and availability.

curated.title:
Dates that
actually
happen.
curated.desc: We don’t just give you a profile; we suggest a safe, campus-vibe spot and an easy conversation opener.

step1.title: Tell us your vibe
step1.desc: Complete your profile before Tuesday night.
step1.example: E.g. 'I love night views at TST'
step1.detailQuote: "Your profile is your digital vibe. We don’t just want your major; we want to know what makes you tick." ✨
step1.vibeTagsDesc: Cloud-chaser, night owl, or library regular
step1.encryptionNote: Your data is encrypted and only shared with your match.

step2.title: Wednesday Drop
step2.detailQuote: "Every Wednesday at 7 PM, the magic happens. No choices, just the one." ✉️
step2.userQuote: "I opened my phone at 7:01 and saw a guy from my college. It felt serendipitous." — CUHK Year 3

step3.title: Share your availability
step3.detailQuote: "We find your overlapping schedule automatically so you don't have to." ☕
step3.check1: Choose from curated campus safe spots.

step4.title: Go on the date
step4.desc: Give feedback to improve next time.
step4.example: E.g. 'Great vibe, let's do it again!'
step4.detailQuote: "Meeting in the real world is where the spark happens." 🌟
step4.userQuote: "Your feedback improves matching for everyone. Your next drop will be better because of it."

home.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about Wednesday drops

faqs.a: Our algorithm looks at more than just photos. It analyzes interests, values, and even your weekly schedule to ensure you meet someone you’ll actually enjoy talking to on campus.
Yes. To keep the community safe and relevant, we only support students from verified Hong Kong university institutions.

faqs.q: Why only one match a week?
faqs.a: Infinite lists lead to fatigue. By giving you one intentional match every Wednesday, we help you focus on really getting to know one person.

faqs.q: What if I don't like my match?
faqs.a: You’re always in control. Provide feedback after every match. If you select 'Pass' or 'Rematch', the algorithm learns your taste. Safety and comfort are our priority.
We suggest meeting at public campus spots like HKU's Book Cafe or CUHK's Lake Ad Excellentiam. Keep it low-pressure, public, and around an hour for the first time.

join.subtitle: Use uni email, verify with dev code, and wait for next Wednesday.

nextDropView.title: You’ve joined the next drop!
nextDropView.desc: Ditto believes in quality over quantity. No more swiping. Every Wednesday at 7:00 PM you get one **intentional match**.
nextDropView.verifiedDesc: We ensure every person is a real student from your school.
nextDropView.highSignalDesc: Algorithm focuses on shared interests and values.
